title: Application
doc_html:
§353.  Application

Whenever, pursuant to any law of the United States of America or regulation of the veterans administration, the administrator requires, prior to payment of benefits, that a tutor or curator be appointed for a ward, such appointment shall be made in the manner hereinafter provided in this Part.
doc_text:
§353.  Application
Whenever, pursuant to any law of the United States of America or regulation of the veterans administration, the administrator requires, prior to payment of benefits, that a tutor or curator be appointed for a ward, such appointment shall be made in the manner hereinafter provided in this Part.
